props.ChoiceText: A witness lied well enough to nearly become the truth, and the courtroom learned how much depends on who is willing to swear first.
props.ChoiceBio: A false witness taught you that justice often arrives second and must speak louder to be heard at all.

0.TransitionText: Because a false witness taught you that justice often arrives second and must speak louder to be heard at all, office remained your daily craft.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Magistrate, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a false witness taught you that justice often arrives second and must speak louder to be heard at all, office hardened into pursuit, examination, and sanctioned suspicion.
1.TransitionPrompt: This scandal could push you toward inquisition and formal pursuit of hidden guilt, but you may remain a magistrate instead.

2.TargetText: Someone who survived that testimony learned to bring evidence to you and no one else.
2.TransitionText: Because a false witness taught you that justice often arrives second and must speak louder to be heard at all, office remained your daily craft.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Magistrate, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TargetText: A witness, clerk, or advocate still carries the memory of that lie.
